generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values safety and stability, I worry about the recent debates on domestic security. While some claim expanded powers are a threat, we've seen how unpreparedness can lead to tragedies. Just look at how quickly local authorities responded to the 2024 Midwest floods - coordination saved lives. Shouldn't we ensure our security agencies have the tools they need to protect us, just as we trust other essential services? #SecurityMatters #CommunitySafety
